A=-411054-(-411055),#q,536594+-536593 do F[q[A]]=(357363-357362)+F[q[A]]end if Q then local n=Q(true)local W=U(n)W[A(-79243-(-68602))],W[A(177534+-188156)],W[A(631953-642573)]=q,S,function()return 204282+-57602 end return n else return u({},{[A(713945+-724567)]=S,[A(-741521+730880)]=q;[A(-453014+442394)]=function()return-828129+974809 end})end end,{},function(q,A)local W=E(A)local Q=function(Q,u,U,G,a,f)return n(q,{Q;u;U;G,a;f},A,W)end return Q end,function(q,A)local W=E(A)local Q=function(...)return n(q,{...},A,W)end return Q end,function(q,A)local W=E(A)local
